summary_text: 目的達成度 **100%**、残り **0スライス**。 **Top risks (current generator)** - **Critical:** default path is `external`, and wrapper enforces only arg/file sanity; no contract validator layer before output/write. [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L16), [xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L162) - **High:** registry-local copies `source_url`/`source_urls` verbatim; malformed “title + URL” strings can pass through as source fields. [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L529) - **High:** proper-noun leak check is narrow (`cursorvers`, `guidescope`, handle, URL), so many branded/person/product nouns can evade detection. [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L20), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L317) - **High:** weak evidence control in generator; no deterministic check for numeric/outcome claims vs linked sources. Contract requires this. [x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L47) - **Medium:** tests verify basic flow and one review-block case, but not URL-shape, claim-evidence, or broad proper-noun leakage. [test-xauto-draft-only.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-xauto-draft-only.sh#L83) **Must remain hard-fail (even if reducing blocked candidates)** - Missing non-X primary source for review/publish eligibility. [x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L46) - Body containing `x.com`/`twitter.com` quote URL. [x-auto-post-guard SKILL](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md#L52) - Proper noun leakage without explicit user approval. [x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L59) - Numeric/outcome claims not directly supported by reachable primary source URLs. [x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L48) - Invalid source URL schema (non-URL strings in `source_urls`). **Low-risk next implementation** - Add a deterministic post-generation validator stage (new script) and call it from `xauto-draft-only.sh` for both `external` and `registry-local`; only enforce the hard-fail set above, keep diversity/similarity as soft ranking signals to reduce unnecessary blocking. - Add fixture tests for each hard-fail and one clean pass case in `tests/test-xauto-draft-only.sh`.
